name: python3-pyqt6.qttexttospeech
title: python3-pyqt6.qttexttospeech
summary: Python bindings for Qt 6 TextToSpeech module
description:
Python bindings for Qt 6 TextToSpeech module
Qt TextToSpeech API enables a Qt application to read out text by using speech
synthesis.
.
This package contains the QtTextToSpeech module of PyQt6.
